hooks.command: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && forbidden=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.md' -not -name 'README.md' -not -name '*.k.md' -type f | head -1) && if [ -n "$forbidden" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Forbidden markdown file in project root: '$forbidden'. Only README.md and *.k.md files are allowed. Use knowledge-workflow for documentation."}'; exit 0; fi
